tasks.check: deno fmt --check apps scripts runtime deno.json && deno lint apps scripts runtime && deno check apps/terminal/src/main.ts apps/workbench/src/main.tsx apps/workbench/src/genui/compiler.worker.ts apps/workbench/genui/preview-shell.ts runtime/genui-compiler.ts scripts/*.ts
tasks.build:terminal: deno task clean:terminal && deno bundle --platform=browser --sourcemap=linked --outdir=dist/terminal apps/terminal/index.html && deno run --allow-read=dist/terminal --allow-write=dist/terminal scripts/verify_terminal_build.ts
tasks.build:workbench: deno task clean:workbench && deno bundle --platform=browser --sourcemap=linked --outdir=dist/workbench apps/workbench/index.html && deno bundle --platform=browser --sourcemap=linked --output=dist/workbench/compiler.worker.js apps/workbench/src/genui/compiler.worker.ts && deno bundle --platform=browser --sourcemap=inline --output=dist/workbench/genui/preview-shell.js apps/workbench/genui/preview-shell.ts && deno run --allow-read=apps/workbench/genui,dist/workbench/genui --allow-write=dist/workbench/genui scripts/inline_preview_shell.ts && deno run --allow-read --allow-write=dist/workbench scripts/copy_esbuild_wasm.ts workbench && deno run --allow-read=dist/workbench --allow-write=dist/workbench scripts/verify_workbench_build.ts
tasks.build:acp-runtime: deno task install:acp-runtime && deno run --allow-read=runtime/acp,dist/runtime --allow-write=dist/runtime scripts/build_acp_runtime.ts && deno run --allow-read=dist/runtime/acp --allow-run scripts/verify_acp_runtime.ts
tasks.build:runtime: deno task clean:runtime && deno bundle --platform=deno --sourcemap=linked --output=dist/runtime/genui-compiler.js runtime/genui-compiler.ts && deno bundle --platform=browser --sourcemap=inline --output=dist/runtime/genui/preview-shell.js apps/workbench/genui/preview-shell.ts && deno run --allow-read=apps/workbench/genui,dist/runtime/genui --allow-write=dist/runtime/genui scripts/inline_preview_shell.ts runtime && deno run --allow-read --allow-write=dist/runtime scripts/copy_esbuild_wasm.ts runtime && deno run --allow-read=dist/runtime --allow-write=dist/runtime scripts/verify_runtime_build.ts && deno task build:acp-runtime
tasks.build: deno task build:terminal && deno task build:workbench && deno task build:runtime
